evidence: The paper identifies "the most important feature in predicting MCL1 dependency was BCL2L1 expression" and "the top predictive feature for MDM2 dependency was RNA expression of EDA2R, a known direct target of p53" and "Predictive feature modeling for HDAC2 highlighted RNA expression of its known target FUCA1." These ranking-based feature importance statements are used to make biological inferences, but the Methods section provides no description of how importance was calculated (scikit-learn default is Gini/MDI). No permutation importance, SHAP, PDP/ALE, conditional importance, or other robust validation of the feature importance rankings is reported; bivariate correlations shown (Fig 8b) do not validate the multivariate feature importance ranking.
